---
title: 'Writer in pain'
date: '2018-01-04T03:13:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1446577044925172209'
blogger_filename: '/2018/01/writer-in-pain.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir="ltr">I should be writing, and part of a writers group, and part of a men's group...</p>
<p dir="ltr">But... </p>
<p dir="ltr">I'm just here...</p>
<p dir="ltr">I exist...</p>
<p dir="ltr">Most days in physical and metaphysical pain...</p>
<p dir="ltr">So tired of pain...</p>
<p dir="ltr">I want to make it stop...</p>
